children.label: A
children.text: on lands under the jurisdiction of the United States, including beaches and shorelines; or

children.label: B
children.text: in waters under the jurisdiction of the United States, including any navigable waters.
Except as used in , the term “Fund” means the Marine Mammal Unusual Mortality Event Fund established by .section 1421f–1 of this titlesection 1421d(a) of this title
The term “Health MAP” means the Marine Mammal Health Monitoring and Analysis Platform established under .section 1421f–2(a)(1) of this title
The term “Observation System” means the National Integrated Coastal and Ocean Observation System established under .section 3603 of title 33
The term “Office” means the Office of Protected Resources, in the National Marine Fisheries Service.

children.label: i
children.text: on a beach or shore of the United States; or

children.label: ii
children.text: in waters under the jurisdiction of the United States (including any navigable waters); or

children.label: i
children.text: on a beach or shore of the United States and unable to return to the water;

children.label: ii
children.text: on a beach or shore of the United States and, although able to return to the water, is in need of apparent medical attention; or

children.label: iii
children.text: in the waters under the jurisdiction of the United States (including any navigable waters), but is unable to return to its natural habitat under its own power or without assistance.

The term “stranding network participant” means a person who is authorized by an agreement under to take marine mammals as described in in response to a stranding.section 1382(c) of this titlesection 1379(h)(1) of this title
The term “Tissue Bank” means the National Marine Tissue Bank provided for under .section 1421f(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: involves a significant die-off of any marine mammal population; and
